query: SELECT pi.competenciaId, c.nome as competenciaNome, pi.notaAtual, pi.metaNota, pi.status FROM plano_individual pi JOIN competencias c ON pi.competenciaId = c.id JOIN alunos a ON pi.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%Wandemberg%' ORDER BY c.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT pi.competenciaId, c.nome as competenciaNome, pi.notaAtual, pi.metaNota, pi.status FROM plano_individual pi JOIN competencias c ON pi.competenciaId = c.id JOIN alunos a ON pi.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%Wandemberg%' ORDER BY c.nome;
